question_intent: average goals scored by the winning team in the first round of the Stanley Cup playoffs, where the winning team's coach was a First Team All-Star

plan.question_intent: average goals scored by the winning team in the first round of the Stanley Cup playoffs, where the winning team's coach was a First Team All-Star
plan.detail_query: SELECT leaf_1.year, leaf_1.round, leaf_1.series, leaf_1.tmidwinner, leaf_1.goalswinner, leaf_1.coachid, leaf_1.award FROM (SELECT sp.year, sp.round, sp.series, sp.tmidwinner, sp.goalswinner, c.coachid, a.award FROM seriespost AS sp JOIN teams AS t ON sp.tmidwinner = t.tmid JOIN coaches AS c ON t.tmid = c.tmid JOIN awardscoaches AS a ON c.coachid = a.coachid WHERE (sp.round = 'QF') AND (a.award = 'First Team All-Star')) AS leaf_1

JOIN coaches AS c ON t.tmid = c.tmid

steps.sql:
SELECT *
FROM seriespost AS sp
LIMIT 5

steps.clause: JOIN teams AS t ON sp.tmidwinner = t.tmid

LIMIT 5

steps.sql:
SELECT *

JOIN coaches AS c ON t.tmid = c.tmid
LIMIT 5

steps.clause: JOIN awardscoaches AS a ON c.coachid = a.coachid
steps.sql:
SELECT *
FROM seriespost AS sp
JOIN teams AS t ON sp.tmidwinner = t.tmid
JOIN coaches AS c ON t.tmid = c.tmid
JOIN awardscoaches AS a ON c.coachid = a.coachid
LIMIT 5

SELECT *
FROM seriespost AS sp
JOIN teams AS t ON sp.tmidwinner = t.tmid
JOIN coaches AS c ON t.tmid = c.tmid
JOIN awardscoaches AS a ON c.coachid = a.coachid
WHERE (sp.round = 'QF')
LIMIT 5

SELECT *
FROM seriespost AS sp
JOIN teams AS t ON sp.tmidwinner = t.tmid
JOIN coaches AS c ON t.tmid = c.tmid
JOIN awardscoaches AS a ON c.coachid = a.coachid
WHERE (sp.round = 'QF') AND (a.award = 'First Team All-Star')
LIMIT 5

SELECT sp.year, sp.round, sp.series, sp.tmidwinner, sp.goalswinner, c.coachid, a.award
FROM seriespost AS sp
JOIN teams AS t ON sp.tmidwinner = t.tmid
JOIN coaches AS c ON t.tmid = c.tmid
JOIN awardscoaches AS a ON c.coachid = a.coachid
WHERE (sp.round = 'QF') AND (a.award = 'First Team All-Star')

build_logs.notes: average goals scored by the winning team

steps.sql:
SELECT *
FROM (SELECT sp.year, sp.round, sp.series, sp.tmidwinner, sp.goalswinner, c.coachid, a.award
FROM seriespost AS sp
JOIN teams AS t ON sp.tmidwinner = t.tmid
JOIN coaches AS c ON t.tmid = c.tmid
JOIN awardscoaches AS a ON c.coachid = a.coachid
WHERE (sp.round = 'QF') AND (a.award = 'First Team All-Star')) AS leaf_1
LIMIT 5

SELECT AVG(leaf_1.goalswinner)
FROM (SELECT sp.year, sp.round, sp.series, sp.tmidwinner, sp.goalswinner, c.coachid, a.award
FROM seriespost AS sp
JOIN teams AS t ON sp.tmidwinner = t.tmid
JOIN coaches AS c ON t.tmid = c.tmid
JOIN awardscoaches AS a ON c.coachid = a.coachid
WHERE (sp.round = 'QF') AND (a.award = 'First Team All-Star')) AS leaf_1

nearest.sql:
SELECT SUM(pts) AS total_points
FROM (SELECT s.playerid, s.year, s.tmid, s.pts, a.award
FROM scoring AS s
JOIN awardsplayers AS a ON s.playerid = a.playerid
JOIN seriespost AS sp ON s.tmid = sp.tmidwinner
JOIN teams AS t ON s.tmid = t.tmid
WHERE (a.award LIKE '%All-Star%')) AS leaf_1

SELECT AVG(avg_goals_against) AS final_avg_goals_against
FROM (SELECT t.name AS team_name, AVG(g.ga) AS avg_goals_against
FROM teams AS t
JOIN goaliessc AS g ON t.tmid = g.tmid
JOIN coaches AS c ON t.tmid = c.tmid
JOIN awardscoaches AS a ON c.coachid = a.coachid
JOIN abbrev AS ab ON t.confid = ab.code
WHERE (t.lgid = 'NHL') AND (t.confid = ab.code) AND (ab.fullname = 'Eastern Conference') AND (a.award = 'Jack Adams')
GROUP BY t.name) AS leaf_1

question: What is the average number of goals scored by the winning team for each First Team All-Star coach in the quarter-final rounds?
